reasoning: The summon VFX effect itself demonstrates good internal color harmony: saturated forest green ring, candy pink central orb, sky blue/cyan dotted accent ring, and cream/off-white petal shapes — all well-represented in the Echoes reference palette. The green+pink+cyan triad reads BRIGHT and warm-leaning, matching the target mood. Palette compatibility is solid. However, the sprite canvas/background is near-pure black (#111-#1a1a), violating the 'colored darks only' rule (should be deep teal/plum/warm brown). While this dark region is likely a transparency placeholder in-engine, it is visually present in the asset sheet and the void areas between frames read as cold neutral black rather than colored shadow. Additionally, the effect lacks warm mid-value representation (sunset oranges, parchment golds) that would push it fully into the Echoes bright-warm register. Shadow and dark areas within the green ring show some teal tinting which is positive, partially satisfying the colored-darks requirement. Net: vibrant effect core with a background/canvas color quality concern.
